phase: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 2 — content and experience families populated (libraries, lists, modules, pages)

fieldMaps.notes: Field consolidation artifacts; schema population for the 12 remaining families occurs in Phase 1 Step 4. The 12 family schemas under schemas/families/ remain skeletons.

template-manifest.notes: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 1 — populated. Template identity, version, ownership, supported ProjectStage/ProjectType/ProjectStatus enum bindings, source traceability, and effective date. mvp_status canonical (VR-24). No secrets (VR-13).

enums.notes: Phase 1 Step 2 — populated. Canonical enum sets defined: ProjectType, ProjectStage, ProjectStatus, DecisionClosureStatus (mvp_status), SiteHealthSeverity, RepairAutomationTier, EnforcementLayer, ValidationRuleCategory. Anti-regression tokens confined to forbiddenValues arrays. The 12 untouched family skeletons retain temporary scaffold-local mvp_status shorthand to be reconciled when each family is populated in Phase 1 Step 3 / Step 4.

settings.notes: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 1 — populated. §10 settings sections; three-form ProcoreCompanyId (default 5280, configuration not secret, VR-10); M365/Teams posture frozen (VR-28); DMSA auth posture; backend-only secret storage (VR-13); §15.2 Project Site Configuration bucketing. mvp_status canonical (VR-24).

permissions.notes: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 1 — populated. Permission templates (10 MVP + 3 Deferred external), central Entra groups, project-local SharePoint groups, phase-based access manager bindings (VR-27, VR-30), Procore mapping owner (PM/PX, never PA — VR-11), Procore directory comparison read-only (VR-15), external-user deferral (VR-18). mvp_status canonical (VR-24).

site.notes: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 1 — populated. Project identity, naming (§5/§5.6), URL conventions, §6.1 required + §6.2 optional metadata, ProjectStage/ProjectStatus/ProjectType enum bindings (VR-01–VR-06, VR-09, VR-29), archive behavior, and Sage Intacct cross-reference (VR-14). mvp_status canonical (VR-24).

pages.notes: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 2 — populated. 17 §13 standard pages (9 MVP + 8 Future): pageUrl pattern under /SitePages/, embeddedModule references (VR-26), defaultOrder 1–17, visibility enum, mvpStatus canonical (VR-24). PCC-facing pages only — never native SharePoint admin/edit/settings surfaces (VR-17).

libraries.notes: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 2 — populated. 12 §14.1 libraries (8 MVP/Required + 3 Optional/Future + 99_Archive). Sync policy enum (§14.2), folder permissions policy (§14.5; VR-17), governed sync exception (§14.5A), readOnlyOnStatus on Closed/Archived (VR-09, VR-29), seedRule keyed strictly on ProjectType (VR-08). No-full-Procore-mirror posture preserved (VR-16; Contract P-10). mvp_status canonical (VR-24).

lists.notes: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 2 — populated. List-level shape covering §15.2 governance lists, §15.3–§15.11 operational lists, with §16.1 baseline columns (Status §16.2, Priority §16.3) inherited by every operational list. Per-list field expansion bounded to requiredFields/optionalFields names; full per-list schemas land downstream as needed. readOnlyOnStatus keys on ProjectStatus (Archived only as Status). Lookups bound by VR-25; owningModule by VR-26; seedRule strictly on ProjectType (VR-08). mvp_status canonical (VR-24).

modules.notes: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 2 — populated. 20 §8.1 modules (8 MVP + 12 Later, plus governance Settings/Site Health entry). visibilityByStage keyed strictly on the six ProjectStage values per VR-07; ProjectType never used as a visibility key; 'Archived' never appears in projectStage enum. verticalSeeding (when present) keyed strictly on ProjectType per VR-08. HBI Assistant carries mvpStatus 'Deferred' per VR-19. mvp_status canonical (VR-24).

workflows.notes: Decision closure, approvals, hand-offs, and stage-gated transitions. Skeleton only.

integrations.notes: Procore (read-only operational), Sage Intacct (accounting book of record), and other allowed external systems. Procore Object Link Records and Procore Curated Summary Records remain placeholder / future-reference only. SPFx must not call Procore directly. Procore write-back deferred from MVP. No secrets stored. Skeleton only.

site-health.notes: Drift detection records, severity classification, repair tier descriptors, audit trace fields. Skeleton only.

provisioning-validation.notes: Provisioning-time invariants, pre-flight checks, no-native-SharePoint-admin guards. Skeleton only.

validation-rules.notes: Phase 1 Step 2 — populated. 13 rule categories, 8 enforcement layers, and the 30 initial rules (VR-01 through VR-30) extracted verbatim from the Phase 0 Step 2 Validation Rule Table Plan. Cross-layer rules carry participating-layer lists; JSON Schema alone does not enforce runtime behavior. Rules are append-only as later Phase 1 steps surface additional bindings.
